title: Blueprint Swarm - Account Extraction
description: Per-account deep-dive schema for analyzing account health, churn risk, and intervention opportunities

account_id.description: CRM account ID or unique identifier

churn_status.description: Current churn status of the account

churn_reason_primary.description: Primary reason for churn or churn risk (null if healthy with no risk signals)

churn_reason_secondary.description: Secondary contributing factor to churn or churn risk (null if not applicable)

signal.description: Description of the warning signal (e.g., 'Champion stopped attending calls', 'Shifted to support-only interactions')

first_appeared.description: Date when this signal was first observed (YYYY-MM-DD)

lead_time_days.description: Number of days between when this signal appeared and the churn/current date

evidence.description: Specific evidence from calls, emails, or CRM data supporting this signal

warning_signals.description: Chronological warning signals that indicated churn risk

when.description: When the intervention should have happened (date or relative timeframe)

what.description: What action could have been taken to prevent or mitigate churn

evidence.description: Evidence from the data that supports this intervention point

intervention_points.description: Moments where intervention could have changed the outcome

initial_champion.description: Name and role of the initial champion who drove the deal

champion_status_at_churn.description: Status of the champion at time of churn (e.g., 'Left company', 'Promoted out of role', 'Disengaged', 'Still active')

replacement_attempted.description: Whether the seller attempted to identify and develop a replacement champion

champion_timeline.description: Timeline of champion engagement from deal close through churn

arr.description: Annual recurring revenue from this account (null if unknown)

expansion_potential_lost.description: Estimated expansion revenue lost due to churn (null if unknown)

revenue_impact.description: Revenue impact of this account's churn or risk

call_summary.description: Narrative summary of the account's journey as told through the calls — from initial engagement through current state. Should read like a story with clear chronological progression.
